stories.title: Paul: LeBron 'not going to be rushed' into decisio...
stories.summary: Rich Paul, the agent for LeBron James, said Monday he does not know when his client will decide what team he'll play for next season. He added that any teams interested in James joining them do not need to do anything else to sway him in the meantime.

stories.title: FIFA to investigate players clash after WC final
stories.summary: FIFA has opened a disciplinary investigation into the ugly scenes that marred the end of Sunday's World Cup final when players and coaches of Argentina and Spain clashed on the field.

stories.title: Red Sox up win streak to 14 on Durbin's clutch HR
stories.summary: Caleb Durbin hit a tiebreaking homer over the Green Monster with two outs in the eighth inning, and the Red Sox extended the second-longest winning streak in club history to 14 games, beating Baltimore 6-5 on Monday night.

stories.title: Pirates' Santana irked by Caballero in Yanks' win
stories.summary: The New York Yankees' offense awoke from its struggles with eight runs in a win over the Pittsburgh Pirates on Monday, but fireworks erupted in the eighth inning when the benches cleared after Jose Caballero irritated Dennis Santana.

stories.title: Tigers focused on July push to keep Tarik Skubal
stories.summary: The Detroit Tigers, 8-6 winners over the Chicago Cubs in 10 innings at Wrigley Field on Monday night, understand the need to win July games so they can keep ace Tarik Skubal through the MLB trade deadline.
